iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 44. Regime claims readiness for prolonged war. Proliferation risk rising as war extends. 44 + 7 (coupling) = 51.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 12:04 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Abu Dhabi civilian killed by missile (Palestinian national, Al Bahyah area) — first civilian death in UAE capital. Total UAE deaths: 7. Dubai airport fire contained, flights gradually resuming. Pakistani tanker + Indian LPG ship transited Hormuz — selective blockade, not total. Araghchi: Hormuz 'open but closed to enemies.' Trump demands 7 nations join Hormuz coalition. Starmer: UK won't join wider war, considering mine-hunting drones. Germany demands clarity on US-Israel aims.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 12:04 — IMMINENT 100. Qantara strike kills 4 incl 2 children. Total: 850+ killed in Lebanon, 800K displaced. Israeli ground operations in southern Lebanon continue. War enters week 3.

turkey.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 86. Financial Post reports Iran missiles targeted Incirlik Air Base, intercepted by USS Oscar Austin. Turkey lodged formal protest with Tehran. Narrative of NATO boundary testing intensifying. No new intercepts in past hour.

india.notes: Day 18 12:00 — ELEVATED 25. India evacuates 550 nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing. No escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 84. Ukraine offers drone expertise to Gulf states seeking to counter Iranian drones. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. Starmer warns of hardest decision being troop deployment. Finland nuclear hosting debate continues.

china.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 34 (w/coupling). Trump may delay Xi summit. China stance on Hormuz unclear. US-China friction over ME crisis.

north_korea.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 76. Kim Jong Un observed large-scale rocket artillery test (10+ ballistic missiles, 600mm MLRS saturation drill). TIMED right after US air defense assets redeployed from South Korea to Middle East. Strategic exploitation of security gap. 100% accuracy claimed on 364km targets. NEW SIGNAL: timing exploitation of US redeployment (+8).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Zelensky says ready for trilateral talks, waiting on US/Russia. Trump slams Zelensky as "far more difficult" than Putin. EU extends Ukraine sanctions 6 months. Ukraine offers drone expertise to Gulf states. Druzhba pipeline damaged. Combat continues.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Kandahar strikes continue. 118K displaced. Deadliest phase. 100 (capped).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 12:00): DPRK exploits US security gap — fires 10+ missiles right after THAAD redeployed. Iran control of Hormuz. Israel ground ops in Lebanon expand. 850+ dead in Lebanon. Incirlik targeted. ZERO de-escalation channels. Global score 92 STABLE at IMMINENT.

latest_news.headline: Abu Dhabi civilian killed by Iranian missile — first civilian death in UAE capital
latest_news.source: The National / NYT / CNA / Al Jazeera
latest_news.text: Missile struck civilian vehicle in Al Bahyah area of Abu Dhabi, killing a Palestinian national. Total UAE fatalities from Iranian attacks now 7. First direct civilian death in the UAE capital.

latest_news.headline: Pakistani tanker first non-Iranian oil vessel to transit Hormuz since blockade
latest_news.text: Pakistani-controlled tanker Karachi carrying crude from Abu Dhabi passed through Strait of Hormuz into Gulf of Oman. Indian LPG ship also transited Saturday. Selective blockade — Iran says open to non-enemies.

latest_news.headline: Dubai airport fire contained, flights gradually resuming after drone strike on fuel tank
latest_news.text: Fire from drone strike on fuel tank near Dubai International Airport contained. No injuries. Flights gradually resuming after temporary suspension.

latest_news.headline: Araghchi: Hormuz 'open but closed to our enemies' — clarifies selective blockade
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi press conference in Tehran: Strait is 'open' from Iran's perspective, 'only closed to our enemies, to those who carried out unjust aggression and to their allies.'

latest_news.headline: Trump demands 7 nations join Hormuz coalition; Starmer signals UK caution
latest_news.text: Trump says he 'demanded' ~7 oil-dependent nations send warships to Hormuz. Starmer: UK seeking 'viable collective plan' with mine-hunting drones but 'will not be drawn into wider war.' Cool allied response.

latest_news.headline: Israeli airstrike kills 4 incl 2 children in Qantara, southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli airstrike on Qantara village in southern Lebanon kills 4 people including 2 children. War continues into week 3.

latest_news.headline: Germany demands US-Israel clarify military aims 'when deployment goals reached'
latest_news.text: German FM Wadephul: US and Israel need to define 'when they consider military aims reached.' EU foreign ministers meeting in Brussels. Says Iran poses 'significant danger' to shipping and global economy.

latest_news.headline: Russia hammers Ukraine with missiles and drones, 6 killed; France to send SAMP/T NG
latest_news.text: Russia fires missiles and drones across Ukraine, killing 6 in several regions. France reportedly sending latest SAMP/T NG anti-aircraft system to Ukraine for battlefield testing against Russian ballistic missiles.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine reports 760 Russian combat losses in past 24 hours
latest_news.text: Ukraine reports ~760 Russian personnel losses in last 24h. Total estimated Russian combat losses since Feb 2022: ~1,279,930. Intense frontline combat continues.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION (Day 18 12:04) — Global war probability 92%. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100: Abu Dhabi civilian killed — first capital city death. Selective Hormuz blockade: Pakistani + Indian ships transiting, Iran says 'open to non-enemies.' Dubai airport fire contained. Trump demands Hormuz coalition, cool allied response. Germany demands clarity. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 100: Qantara strike kills 4 incl 2 children. 850+ killed, 800K displaced. Week 3. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100: Russia barrages Ukraine, 6 killed. France sends SAMP/T NG. Zelensky awaits trilateral talks. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100: Kandahar strikes continue. (5) DPRK IMMINENT 76 RISING: 10+ missiles timed after US THAAD redeployment. (6) RUSSIA-NATO IMMINENT 84: Incirlik targeted, NATO boundary testing. (7) TURKEY IMMINENT 86. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 44: Prolonged war desperation risk. KEY SHIFT: Hormuz blockade is selective, not total — non-aligned states can transit. Araghchi formalized 'open to friends, closed to enemies' policy. This partially de-escalates global shipping crisis but the US/allied naval confrontation track intensifies.
